title: 神殺しの蒼銀
description:
■Prologue: Where Fate Begins to Move

A region-conquest simulation RPG where bonds with your allies shape destiny.
—The choices you make, the battles you fight, will determine how the story unfolds.
The bonds forged throughout the story
will greatly alter the battles to come—and their outcomes.
The result of each battle,
layered one upon another through even the smallest differences,
will eventually reshape fate itself.

—A battle that was meant to end in merciless defeat.

—A nation that was destined to fall.

—Companions who were never meant to meet.

Your actions will change all of it.
Defy the fate decreed by the gods,
and see if you can reach the truth at the end of Silver Blade.

■Fast-Paced Tactical Battles

Combat in this SRPG has been optimized

to resolve quickly, avoiding drawn-out encounters.

Strike enemy weaknesses to gain extra actions with the “Chain Attack System.”

Break enemy formations at once by defeating their leader with the “Platoon System.”

Prevent prolonged battles with the “Turn Limit System.”

Plan your strategy and bring each battle to a swift conclusion.

■Map Mode: Shape the Battlefield Through Strategy

This is the strategic phase where you advance the story

by expanding your territory and seizing enemy-controlled regions.

Depending on the route you choose,

the scenario itself may change.

Your next move may shape the future.

Plan carefully, and choose the best course of action.

■Preparation and Growth Shape Your Fate

 Seven classes and class changes Stroll events to bond with Your companions Platoon dispatch quests Trial Cave for leveling up Platoon bonuses triggered by character combinations Your choices and preparation will determine where the story ultimately leads.

■Special Battles

Under certain conditions, massive robot battles, Colossus Battles will occur.

These encounters bring a level of tension unlike standard battles.

Rendered in late-90s-style pixel animation,

this is a story of branching paths and trust.
description_short: A region-conquest simulation RPG where bonds with your allies shape fate. —The choices you make, and the battles you fight, will determine how the story unfolds. Fast-paced tactical battles. A strategic map mode where your decisions shift the tide of war. Preparation and growth that change destiny.
